name: Kippy Mucklefoot
sd_appearance: A stocky halfling, no taller than three feet, hunched with a mechanical leg of jagged salvaged steel glinting under dim light, his pale green slit-pupiled eyes gleam with feline sharpness as he clutches a rusted dagger at his hip, weathered leather armor reinforced with patchwork chainmail bearing faded Guild insignia, a crossbow slung across his back and a scroll case tucked into his belt, one hand perpetually stained with ink and grease from unloading forbidden relics into the Gutterpunk Quarter’s shadowed alleys.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
